narrative.description: F.E.A.R. 2: Project Origin (2009) is a acclaimed platformer title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Traverse stages, overcome hazards, defeat bosses, and unlock new areas.
